summary: Remove the out-of-scope NAS sync changes from the cloud release.

notes: Removes the NAS sync migration from the release stream.
Keeps approval audit scope migrations 127 and 128.
Production already applied 127 and 128; this release removes the app and assertion surface that referenced NAS sync.
No additional frontend behavior changes beyond the approval audit visibility, reviewed period filter, and employee edit modal fixes.
The production bundle is rebuilt with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.29.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.29.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.29.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.29.
Run scripts/smoke-timesheet-withdraw.sql on the cloud host after deployment.
known_warnings: V0.18.28 deployed successfully at the app/container level but post-deploy checks failed on NAS sync grants.
Unit test command currently exits successfully with no matching test files.
